domain: Guitar education from zero to hero — structured learning paths, formal courses, practical applications, and chatbot-integrated pedagogy
research_areas: Zero-to-hero learning path design (beginner → intermediate → advanced → mastery)
Formal course structure and sequencing (theory, technique, ear training, improvisation)
Practical application exercises (jam tracks, songwriting, arrangement, performance)
Chatbot-integrated pedagogy — what the GA bot teaches and in what order
Adaptive difficulty and spaced repetition for music skills
Assessment design — how to measure musical competency progression
Cross-domain integration — connecting theory, technique, and creativity into unified understanding
Reference curriculum curation — Savoir sans Frontières, open educational resources
curriculum: GA Zero to Hero: Absolute Beginner (open strings, first chords, basic rhythm)
GA Zero to Hero: Early Intermediate (barre chords, scales, simple songs)
GA Zero to Hero: Intermediate (modes, chord extensions, fingerpicking, improvisation basics)
GA Zero to Hero: Advanced (jazz voicings, advanced harmony, composition, performance)
Formal Course: Music Theory Foundations (intervals, scales, keys, chord construction)
Formal Course: Ear Training (interval recognition, chord identification, transcription)
Formal Course: Rhythm and Groove (time signatures, subdivisions, feel, groove patterns)
Formal Course: Improvisation (pentatonic, modal, chromatic, motivic development)
Formal Course: Songwriting and Composition (form, harmony, melody, lyrics integration)
Application: Jam Track Workshop (backing tracks with guided soloing exercises)
Application: Song Study Lab (learn, analyze, and perform real songs)
Application: Style Exploration (blues, jazz, rock, classical, fingerstyle, metal)
Application: Recording and Production Basics (DAW, tone, mixing for guitarists)
Chatbot Integration: Conversational lesson flow design
Chatbot Integration: Adaptive question-answer pedagogical patterns
Chatbot Integration: Progress tracking and skill assessment via conversation

learning_path_philosophy.principle: Alchemy transforms base materials into gold — we transform curiosity into mastery
learning_path_philosophy.approach: Every concept connects to playing music. Theory serves practice, never the reverse.

stages.name: Nigredo
stages.focus: Breaking down — unlearning bad habits, building foundations

stages.name: Rubedo
stages.focus: Completion — integration, teaching others, artistic identity
